ORDER (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL DENIED [X] THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
